title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 217.165 - Chief administrative officers of each correctional center, appointment
text:
217.165.  Chief administrative officers of each correctional center, appointment. — The department director shall in accordance with chapter 36 appoint for each correctional center a chief administrative officer.
(L. 1982 H.B. 1196 § 33, A.L. 1989 H.B. 408, A.L. 1995 H.B. 424)
